definition: The Treasury basis trade (~$800B-1T) and FX carry ($4-6T notional) share a dual fragility corridor through dollar funding markets. Transmission: basis unwind → UST illiquidity → repo spike → CIP basis widening → dollar squeeze → forced EM carry unwind, propagating in 24-72 hours. Bimodal: small shocks absorbed, large shocks activate feedback loop.
evidence: Either market can be entry point
24-72 hour propagation observed in stress episodes
open_questions: Standing repo facility (SRF) may partially break corridor but untested under genuine stress
Overlap in funding markets is approximate, not precisely measured
